notes: In-store transaction systems; evolved from standalone terminals to cloud-based POS by 2010s
SCM software was emerging category in retail; became dominant by 2000s with SAP, Oracle, Manhattan Associates
Retail-specific inventory planning and allocation software; now part of unified commerce suites
Retail analytics and reporting; evolved into modern retail intelligence and AI-driven demand forecasting
Standard for supplier-retailer data exchange; still used in retail supply chains though gradually replaced by API integrations
Online storefronts mentioned as emerging channel; became dominant by 2010s (Amazon, Shopify)
ERP adoption in retail was early-stage in 1998; became standard infrastructure by mid-2000s
